name: FUTURE TECHNOLOGY COMPANY FOR TECHNOLOGY AND INFORMATICS SERVICES
notes:
FTCOM ISP is a private company founded in 2004 which consider a leading provider for a wide variety of internet services; voice and data In iraq

FTCOM ISP has ultimate goal to build up state-of-the-art telecom infrastructure in order to ease the life of its customers and delivers a wide-range of carrier services .

Unlike others, FTCOM ISP plans its strategy based on the customers’ needs and ambitions. We consider our real opportunity is supporting our customer’s growth and helping them maximizing their profit..
